pnp:ContentType.Name: Content Freshness
pnp:ContentType.Description: Used to create a dynamic page related to contentfreshness.

Field.Name: DocumentStatus
Field.Title: Document Status

Field.Description: The Contractors internal document without the document revision description. If there are multiple drawing sheets, include the first sheet number.
Field.Name: ContractorInternalDocumentNumber
Field.Title: Contractor Internal Document Number

Field.Description: Check the Select Discipline column in the CDR list as confirmation if this is required. Otherwise, select 'Not Applicablele'
Field.Name: Discipline
Field.Title: Discipline

Field.Description: Only required for Drawing numbers. Use 01 for drawings with one sheet. Leave blank if not applicable.
Field.Name: SheetNumber
Field.Title: Sheet Number

Field.CustomFormatter: {"elmType":"div","style":{"flex-wrap":"wrap","display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"box-sizing":"border-box","padding":"4px 8px 5px 8px","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis","display":"flex","border-radius":"16px","height":"24px","align-items":"center","white-space":"nowrap","margin":"4px 4px 4px Field.Description: Change to 'Submitted by Contractor' only once all fields are complete for the Employer document number to generate.
Field.Name: Status
Field.Title: Entry Status

Field.Description: If this entry is a revision to an existing Document Number, select the option 'Document Revision'. Otherwise, select 'New Entry'.
Field.Name: EntryType
Field.Title: Entry Type

Field.Description: The base drawing number that sheets will be added to.
Field.Name: DrawingNumber
Field.Title: Contractors Base Drawing Number

Field.Description: The number for the new sheet.
Field.Name: NewSheetNumber
Field.Title: New Sheet Number

Field.Description: The Revision of the New Sheet to be added. Should be a first entry ('A', '0', or '1' as applicable).
Field.Name: Revision
Field.Title: Revision

Field.Description: The Contractors full drawing number, including sheet number, excluding Revision description.
Field.Name: ContractorsDrawingNumber
Field.Title: Contractors Drawing & New Sheet Number

Field.Description: The base drawing number that sheets will be added to.
Field.Name: Employers_x0020_Drawing_x0020_Nu
Field.Title: Employers Drawing Number: Title

Field.Description: The base drawing number that sheets will be added to.
Field.Name: Employers_x0020_Drawing_x0020_Nu0
Field.Title: Document Type

Field.Description: The base drawing number that sheets will be added to.
Field.Name: Employers_x0020_Drawing_x0020_Nu1
Field.Title: Discipline

Field.Description: The base drawing number that sheets will be added to.
Field.Name: Employers_x0020_Drawing_x0020_Nu2
Field.Title: Employers Base Drawing Number

Field.Name: EntryStatus
Field.Title: Entry Status

Field.DisplayName: Contract Document Number: Employer Document Number
Field.Name: Contract_x0020_Document_x0020_Nu0
Field.Title: Contract Document Number: Employer Document Number

Field.Name: CDRStatus
Field.Title: Entry Status

pnp:DataRow.pnp:DataValue: General – non discipline specific (incl. Marine; Dredging; Light Houses; Aviation)
Professional Services Contract / Supplier / Supply Contracts
